instruction: Open Safari and navigate to the {SITE} homepage.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 URL fidelity); url_match_normalized strips the tracking/session query Safari may append, the macOS analogue of OSWorld is_expected_active_tab_approximate

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to quit' 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to make new document with properties {URL:"https://www.cove.invalid/start"}' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to set URL of front document to "{URL}"' -e 'delay 1' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Safari" to return URL of front document
